evidence: "I like reading mysteries, but I usually can't watch them on TV because it is too easy for me to guess the outcome."
"This movie provided insight on a part of San Francisco lesbian culture with which I was unfamiliar."
"The interweaving of themes, plots and characters comprising nontraditional/nonlinear story arcs is refreshing."
"Thorough and thought provoking with a clear timeline and the benefit of several perspectives."
"The pacing was sometimes awkward and a couple of the plot lines were a little heavy handed."
"The plots are well timed and don't give everything away too early."
"Fabulous casting and absolutely great set dressing pulled me in and got my total suspension of disbelief buy in."
"Enjoying this quite a bit. The acting is pretty solid and the plots are well timed."
"This man is a storyteller of the highest order. His comedy is hilarious without needing the crutch of being cruel or mean spirited."
"A completely addictive binge watching TV experience with great acting and engaging story lines which really satisfy and stay with you."
"It was interesting to hear the women's personal stories in the context of the larger history of our civil rights movement."
"MUCH funnier than we expected. A highlight of our week and proof this comedian has stayed relevant all these years."

summary: The user enjoys complex narratives, particularly in the mystery and documentary genres, and appreciates high production quality. They have a strong emotional engagement with the content they consume, often finding it thought-provoking and entertaining.
